description: GSA is the U.S. General Services Administration, which operates public digital services and datasets spanning procurement, travel, analytics, and regulatory information. Its websites also publish developer documentation for several government APIs.
summary: gsa.gov exposes multiple HTTP APIs documented on open.gsa.gov; verified surfaces include the Discovery Market Research API plus analytics.usa.gov, Per Diem, Site Scanning, Regulations.gov, and SAM.gov Entity Management, all using API keys from api.data.gov/SAM-style docs and no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
